metadata.methodology: GWM 5-dimension persecution scoring. Each country scored 0-20 on: state_persecution, non_state_violence, legal_status_conversion, indigenous_church_viability, trajectory. Sum = composite 0-100. See /methodology/.

scoring_config.notes: Tier assigned by composite score. <25 = Lower.

countries.name: Afghanistan
countries.notes: Taliban regime; conversion = death; near-zero Christian presence post-2021

countries.name: Albania
countries.notes: Religious freedom protected; pluralistic society

countries.name: Algeria
countries.notes: Ordinance 06-03; church closures accelerating since 2018

countries.name: Angola
countries.notes: Some unregistered church restrictions

countries.name: Armenia
countries.notes: Orthodox dominance; minor friction for evangelicals

countries.name: Australia
countries.notes: Some legislative friction on religious expression

countries.name: Azerbaijan
countries.notes: Religion law restricts non-registered groups; raids on house churches

countries.name: Bahrain
countries.notes: Expat worship allowed; no proselytism; small indigenous community

countries.name: Bangladesh
countries.notes: Family/social pressure on converts; Islamist mob violence

countries.name: Belarus
countries.notes: Authoritarian crackdown on unregistered groups since 2020

countries.name: Benin
countries.notes: Northern jihadist spillover from Burkina Faso

countries.name: Bhutan
countries.notes: Anti-conversion law; Buddhism state religion; underground churches

countries.name: Brazil
countries.notes: Some indigenous evangelism restrictions; gang violence affecting clergy

countries.name: Brunei
countries.notes: Sharia penal code; no public Christian symbols; conversion criminalized

countries.name: Bulgaria
countries.notes: Some local restrictions on evangelism

countries.name: Burkina Faso
countries.notes: JNIM/ISGS jihadist campaigns; church closures across north

countries.name: Cambodia
countries.notes: Some Buddhist nationalism friction

countries.name: Cameroon
countries.notes: Boko Haram, Anglophone crisis affecting churches

countries.name: Central African Republic
countries.notes: Anti-balaka/Seleka legacy; ongoing instability

countries.name: Chad
countries.notes: Lake Chad jihadist spillover

countries.name: China
countries.notes: CCP surveillance state; sinicization; pastor imprisonment; Xinjiang

countries.name: Colombia
countries.notes: FARC/ELN remnants kill pastors; indigenous-area threats

countries.name: Comoros
countries.notes: Conversion illegal for citizens; tiny underground church

countries.name: Cuba
countries.notes: Communist state surveillance; pastor harassment; church demolitions

countries.name: Djibouti

countries.name: DR Congo
countries.notes: ADF Islamist insurgency; M23; massacres of Christians in east

countries.notes: Coptic discrimination; church building restrictions; mob violence

countries.name: El Salvador
countries.notes: Gang violence affecting clergy

countries.name: Eritrea
countries.notes: Pastors in shipping container prisons; only 4 religions registered

countries.name: Ethiopia
countries.notes: Tigray conflict; communal violence; pastors killed

countries.name: Finland
countries.notes: Rasanen prosecution case; ongoing speech concerns

countries.name: France
countries.notes: Church attacks rising; secularist legal pressure

countries.name: Georgia
countries.notes: Orthodox dominance; pressure on non-Orthodox

countries.name: Ghana
countries.notes: Northern jihadist spillover risk

countries.name: Greece
countries.notes: Orthodox state religion; minor friction

countries.name: Haiti
countries.notes: Gang violence; voodoo-Christian tensions

countries.name: India
countries.notes: Hindutva mob violence; anti-conversion laws in 11+ states; rising trend

countries.name: Indonesia
countries.notes: Aceh sharia; church closures; Islamist pressure rising

countries.name: Iran
countries.notes: House church arrests; 10+ year prison terms; apostasy capital crime

countries.name: Iraq
countries.notes: Christian exodus post-ISIS; militia harassment of Nineveh Plain

countries.name: Israel and the Palestinian Territories
countries.notes: Pressure on Palestinian Christians; Messianic Jew restrictions

countries.name: Japan
countries.notes: Social pressure; family ostracism of converts

countries.name: Jordan
countries.notes: Indigenous churches tolerated; conversion legally fraught; tribal/family pressure

countries.notes: Boko Haram/ISWAP; 2023 coup worsened security

countries.name: North Korea
countries.notes: Only nation with zero legal Christian existence; 50,000+ in labor camps

countries.notes: Buddhist nationalism; church attacks; 2019 Easter bombing legacy
